relative_path: Billing and ordering instructions/Shipments_FedEx_UPS_Färkkilä_lab/Shipment to US, advices, examples of proforma/Shipment to US advices.docx
full_text:
Hi Anastasiya,

I´m not sure if you already had all kind of advice, but we have been sending all shipments with FedEx on-line requests, which is the simplest way:

https://www.fedex.com/en-fi/home.html

Tel. 010 800 515.

You should have your own group´s user account created by FedEx customer service. When starting to make a new request, use "all features". The Proforma invoice is created automatically depending your selection of country and you can print out the papers (three copies) in the end of the request process.

However the shipments to USA also need to include three copies of USDA statement signed separately (see the attachment). It is important that the information of the sample itself ("exempt human tissue paraffin sections on slides/ antibody vial; non-infectious, non-contagious, non-hazardous, non-toxic. Being supplied free of charge with no commercial transaction") is mentioned the same way in both documents. I would not use any "biological substance category B" labels with these. The minimum (but relevant) information from the samples, the most chances they will get through the customs. This is how I have succeeded over the years.

I don't remember sending anything with cool blocks to US,... but it's best to describe them also in the contents. You could ask the FedEx customer service if there is any extra requirements.

23.2.2021

| FedEx | Express Delivery, Courier & Shipping Services | Finland
Choose a shipping service that suit your needs with FedEx. Whether you need a courier for next day delivery, if it’s heavy or lightweight – you’ll find a solution for your business.
www.fedex.com

| Innilä, V Markus, markus.innila@helsinki.fi
